revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Country data Republic of Afghanistan (1987–1992)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Country data Republic of Afghanistan (1987–1992)]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing templates from wikipedia
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Democratic Republic of Afghanistan | shortname alias=Afghanistan | flag alias = Flag of Afghanistan (1987–1992).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | redir1 = Republic of Afghanistan (1987–92) | related1 = Afghanistan | related2 = Emirate of Afghanistan | related3 = Kingdom of Afghanistan | related4 = Emirate of Afghanistan (1929) | related5 = Republic of Afghanistan (1973–1978) | related6 = Democratic Republic of Afghanistan | related7 = Islamic State of Afghanistan | related8 = Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan (1996–2001) | related9 = Transitional Islamic State of Afghanistan | related10 = Islamic Republic of Afghanistan | related11 = Taliban | cat = Afghanistan, Republic </noinclude> }}
[[Category:11]][[sn:Country data Republic of Afghanistan (1987–1992)]][[Category:11]] [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates.
Text replacement - "{{draft categories|" to "<noinclude> {{Draft categories| [[Category:templates with draft categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:templates with draft categories fixed 3]]</noinclude>"
Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects C]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Templates with draft categories
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{Draft categories|↵}}" to ""
revision.text:
{{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Democratic Republic of Afghanistan | shortname alias=Afghanistan | flag alias = Flag of Afghanistan (1987–1992).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | redir1 = Republic of Afghanistan (1987–92) | related1 = Afghanistan | related2 = Emirate of Afghanistan | related3 = Kingdom of Afghanistan | related4 = Emirate of Afghanistan (1929) | related5 = Republic of Afghanistan (1973–1978) | related6 = Democratic Republic of Afghanistan | related7 = Islamic State of Afghanistan | related8 = Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan (1996–2001) | related9 = Transitional Islamic State of Afghanistan | related10 = Islamic Republic of Afghanistan | related11 = Taliban | cat = Afghanistan, Republic </noinclude> }}
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude></noinclude> \n</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Republic_of_Afghanistan_%281987%E2%80%931992%29 here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Country_data_Republic_of_Afghanistan_%281987%E2%80%931992%29 for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{ {{{1<noinclude>|country showdata</noinclude>}}} | alias = Democratic Republic of Afghanistan | shortname alias=Afghanistan | flag alias = Flag of Afghanistan (1987–1992).svg | size = {{{size|}}} | name = {{{name|}}} | altlink = {{{altlink|}}} | altvar = {{{altvar|}}} | variant = {{{variant|}}} <noinclude> | redir1 = Republic of Afghanistan (1987–92) | related1 = Afghanistan | related2 = Emirate of Afghanistan | related3 = Kingdom of Afghanistan | related4 = Emirate of Afghanistan (1929) | related5 = Republic of Afghanistan (1973–1978) | related6 = Democratic Republic of Afghanistan | related7 = Islamic State of Afghanistan | related8 = Islamic Emirate of Afghanistan (1996–2001) | related9 = Transitional Islamic State of Afghanistan | related10 = Islamic Republic of Afghanistan | related11 = Taliban | cat = Afghanistan, Republic </noinclude> }}
<noinclude> <noinclude>\n<noinclude></noinclude> \n [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
